🥭 Real Alphonso vs Chemically Ripened

Here's how to tell the difference before you buy

❌ Chemically Ripened
VS
✅ Genuine Ratnagiri Alphonso

Flat uniform yellow — evenly coloured, almost artificial. No natural patches.

1
1

Saffron-yellow with green patches — natural gradient. Never uniformly yellow.

Hard to the touch — feels firm even when "ripe". The flesh inside is often dry.

2
2

Soft & yields gently — slight give when pressed. Smooth, fiberless, buttery flesh.

No fragrance — or a faint chemical / solvent smell. You can't smell it from a distance.

3
3

Strong floral fragrance — you can smell it the moment you open the box. Unmistakable Hapus aroma.

Watery & bland taste — no depth of sweetness. You'd never know it was Alphonso.

4
4

Rich, deep sweetness — complex flavour, slight tartness. No fibres, melts in the mouth.

Our Story

We are a family of mango farmers from Ratnagiri, Maharashtra — bringing the world's finest Alphonso mangoes directly from our orchards to your doorstep.

🌳 How It All Began

For three generations, our family has been cultivating Alphonso mangoes on the red lateritic soil of Ratnagiri, Maharashtra. Our grandfather planted the first mango trees on our orchard over 60 years ago — trees that still bear the finest Hapus in the region today.

For decades, like most farmers, we sold our harvest to local traders at low prices — only to see the same mangoes rebranded and sold to customers at three or four times the price. Worse, customers were often being sold inferior mangoes from other regions labelled as "Ratnagiri Hapus".

That's when we decided to go direct. Mango Direct was born with a single mission: to connect mango lovers across India and the world directly with the farmers who grow the real thing — no middlemen, no markups, no fakes. Just pure, authentic Ratnagiri Alphonso, guaranteed.

🎯 Our Mission & Values

🤝

Farm to Doorstep

We eliminate every middleman. When you order from Mango Direct, you are buying directly from the farmer's orchard.

🚫🧪

100% Carbide Free

Every mango is naturally ripened in grass hay — never treated with calcium carbide or any artificial ripening agents.

✅

GI Certified Authentic

Our Alphonso mangoes carry the Geographical Indication (GI) certification — your guarantee of origin and authenticity.

🌿

Sustainable Farming

We follow traditional, eco-friendly farming practices that preserve the soil, the trees, and the natural ecosystem of our orchard.

👨‍🌾

Farmer Empowerment

By going direct, we ensure farmers receive a fair price for their produce and can invest back into their orchards and families.

💯

Quality Guaranteed

Every box is hand-graded before dispatch. If you are not satisfied, we make it right — no questions asked.

🌄 Our Orchard

Our family orchard is nestled in the hills of Ratnagiri, overlooking the Arabian Sea. The unique combination of the region's volcanic red laterite soil, the moisture-laden sea breeze, and the warm Maharashtra sun gives our Alphonso mangoes their legendary sweetness and aroma.

We grow two premium grades — Alphonso A1+ (our finest, averaging 300gm per fruit) and Alphonso A1 (the classic 200–250gm Hapus). Both grades are grown on the same trees, hand-selected by our family, and dispatched within hours of harvest.

🌳
Orchard established 1962
Mango trees 400+
Generations farming 3rd
Location Ratnagiri, MH

Return & Refund Policy

We stand behind the quality of every mango we send. If something's not right, we'll make it right.

Last updated: March 2026

✅ Our Quality Promise

At Mango Direct, your satisfaction is our top priority. We take immense pride in the quality of our mangoes. Every box is carefully inspected before dispatch. If your order does not meet our quality standards upon delivery, we will resolve it — no hassle, no lengthy processes.

🥭 1. Nature of Our Products

Please note that mangoes are fresh, perishable agricultural produce. Due to their nature:

  • We do not accept physical returns of delivered mangoes.
  • Complaints must be raised within 24 hours of delivery with photo/video evidence.
  • Claims raised after 24 hours of delivery cannot be processed as the condition of the fruit can no longer be verified.
  • Natural variation in size, colour, and flavour intensity between individual mangoes is not considered a defect.

✅ 2. Valid Reasons for Refund or Replacement

We will issue a full refund or replacement in the following situations:

  • 🍂 Mangoes arrived rotten, mouldy or spoilt upon delivery
  • 💔 Mangoes arrived severely bruised or physically damaged due to packaging failure
  • 📦 You received the wrong variety or wrong quantity
  • 🚫 Order was never delivered and tracking confirms non-delivery
  • 🌡️ Mangoes arrived in an unacceptable condition due to a packaging or handling failure on our end

❌ 3. Situations Not Eligible for Refund

The following situations are not eligible for a refund or replacement:

  • Mangoes that have ripened or softened naturally after delivery (this is expected for fresh fruit)
  • Minor cosmetic imperfections such as small marks, colour patches or skin blemishes that do not affect taste
  • Complaints raised more than 24 hours after delivery
  • Delivery failures due to incorrect address provided by the customer
  • Delivery failures due to customer unavailability after 2 delivery attempts
  • Dissatisfaction with natural taste variation between mango varieties or seasonal batches
  • Orders where the customer changed their mind after dispatch

📋 4. How to Raise a Complaint

If you believe your order qualifies for a refund or replacement, please follow these steps:

  1. Contact us within 24 hours of receiving your order.
  2. Email us at help@mangodirect.in or call +91 98208 12318.
  3. Include your Order ID and clear photos or a short video showing the condition of the mangoes.
  4. Our team will review your complaint and respond within 4–6 hours on business days.
  5. If your claim is approved, we will offer a replacement or full refund — your choice.

💳 5. Refund Process

  • Approved refunds are processed within 5–7 business days.
  • Refunds are credited to your original payment method (credit/debit card, UPI, net banking, wallet).
  • You will receive an email confirmation once the refund is initiated.
  • Bank processing times may vary — most refunds appear within 3–5 working days after initiation.
  • Refunds will be processed to the original payment method within 5–7 business days.

🚫 6. Order Cancellations

  • Orders can be cancelled within 2 hours of placing them, as harvesting begins shortly after confirmation.
  • To cancel, contact us immediately at help@mangodirect.in or call us.
  • Orders cannot be cancelled once dispatched.
  • If a cancellation is approved, a full refund will be processed within 5–7 business days.
  • For international orders, cancellations must be made before the order is packed for air freight. International cancellations after packing may incur a partial deduction to cover packaging costs.

🌍 7. International Orders

  • Due to the complexity of international air freight, refunds for international orders are evaluated on a case-by-case basis.
  • If mangoes arrive damaged due to courier mishandling or packaging failure, we will offer a partial or full refund after reviewing evidence.
  • Delays caused by customs clearance are outside our control and do not qualify for a refund.
  • International shipping charges are non-refundable unless the entire order is confirmed lost or undelivered.

📞 8. Contact Us

We're here to help. Reach out to us for any return or refund related queries:

  • 📧 Email: help@mangodirect.in
  • 📞 Phone: +91 98208 12318
  • 🕘 Support Hours: Monday – Saturday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST
🥭

Had an issue with your order?

Don't worry — we've got you covered. Get in touch and we'll sort it out right away.

🚚

Shipping Policy

Everything you need to know about how we deliver your premium mangoes — fresh, fast and with care.

Last updated: March 2026

📦 1. Order Processing

At Mango Direct, we take freshness seriously. Unlike regular e-commerce, your mangoes are not sitting in a warehouse — they are harvested specifically for your order.

  • Orders placed before 12:00 PM (noon) IST are processed the same day.
  • Orders placed after 12:00 PM will be processed the following business day.
  • Processing includes harvesting, quality grading, cleaning, and careful packaging.
  • You will receive an order confirmation email immediately after placing your order.
  • A dispatch notification with tracking details will be sent once your order ships.

🇮🇳 2. Domestic Shipping (Within India)

We ship across India via BlueDart, one of India's most reliable courier networks, ensuring your mangoes are carefully packed and handled throughout transit.

Delivery ZoneEstimated Delivery TimeCoverage
⚡ Mumbai & PuneWithin 24 HoursSame/Next Day
🚀 Metro Cities24 – 48 HoursDelhi, Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Ahmedabad
🚚 Tier 2 Cities48 – 72 Hours500+ cities across India
🛻 Remote Areas72 – 96 HoursSelect PIN codes

Use our PIN code checker on the homepage or at checkout to confirm deliverability and estimated timeline for your specific location.

💰 3. Shipping Charges (India)

All OrdersShipping Charge
Any order value🎉 FREE Delivery

We offer FREE delivery on all orders across India. No hidden fees!

✈️ 4. International Shipping

We ship premium export-quality mangoes internationally to the following countries:

  • 🇦🇪 United Arab Emirates (UAE)
  • 🇬🇧 United Kingdom (UK)
  • 🇺🇸 United States of America (USA)
  • 🇨🇦 Canada
  • 🇦🇺 Australia
  • 🇸🇬 Singapore
  • 🌐 Other countries — contact us for availability

Important notes for international orders:

  • Minimum order quantity is 3 dozen (36 mangoes).
  • All international shipments are sent via air freight to ensure maximum freshness.
  • Estimated delivery: 3–5 business days from dispatch (subject to customs clearance).
  • International shipping charges vary by destination country and order size. Charges will be confirmed via email/WhatsApp before dispatch.
  • All shipments are fully compliant with destination country import regulations.
  • Special export-grade packaging is used for all international orders.
  • All international orders require online payment via Razorpay.

📦 5. Packaging

We take great care to ensure your mangoes arrive in perfect condition:

  • Mangoes are individually cushioned and packed in ventilated, eco-friendly corrugated boxes.
  • Each box is designed to allow air circulation and prevent bruising during transit.
  • Mangoes are packed to withstand transit and stay fresh until they reach your door.
  • International orders use special export-grade packaging that complies with destination country phytosanitary regulations.
  • Gift orders come with premium decorative packaging. A personalised message card can be included on request.

🔍 6. Order Tracking

  • Once your order is dispatched, you will receive a tracking number via email and SMS.
  • You can track your shipment directly on the BlueDart website (for domestic orders) using your tracking number.
  • For international orders, tracking details will be shared via email once shipped.
  • If you have not received tracking details within 24 hours of your order, please contact us at help@mangodirect.in.

⚠️ 7. Delivery Failures & Re-attempts

  • Our courier partner will attempt delivery up to 2 times if you are unavailable.
  • Please ensure someone is available to receive the package as mangoes are perishable.
  • If delivery fails after 2 attempts, the package will be held at the nearest BlueDart facility for 24 hours before being returned.
  • Due to the perishable nature of mangoes, refunds cannot be issued for failed deliveries caused by recipient unavailability.
  • Please ensure your delivery address and phone number are correct at the time of ordering.

🌦️ 8. Delays & Force Majeure

While we do everything in our power to deliver on time, delays may occasionally occur due to:

  • Extreme weather conditions (heavy rainfall, cyclones, heat waves)
  • Public holidays and regional strikes
  • Customs delays (for international orders)
  • Natural disasters or unforeseen events

In such cases, we will proactively inform you and work to resolve the situation as quickly as possible. Mango Direct shall not be held liable for delays caused by such circumstances.

📞 9. Contact Us

For any shipping-related queries, please reach out to us:

  • 📧 Email: help@mangodirect.in
  • 📞 Phone: +91 98208 12318
  • 🕘 Support Hours: Monday – Saturday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST
